column1: # Source of truth for which files install.sh ships into a downstream and how
#   src_path  — path inside the jak-pipeline skill repo (relative to JAK_SKILL_ROOT)
#   dst_path  — path inside the downstream project (relative to DOWNSTREAM_ROOT)
#                 skill         — always refresh from upstream; back up locally-modified
#                 skill-append  — refresh from upstream, then re-apply install.sh's
#                                 managed append (currently only tick.sh's Jira hook)
# v1 scope: scripts only. Customisable files (.claude/agents/*.md, .mergify.yml,
# docker-compose.local-uat.yml) and MCP server bundle remain managed by install.sh's
# existing never-overwrite logic. Lines starting with '#' are comments.
# Empty lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored.
